zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Latimer於大約1260年出生在蘇格蘭艾爾金爾時，她的父親William le Latimer 1st Baron Latimer of Corby20歲，母親Alice Ledet13歲。她於大約1277年與Sir Alexander Comyn結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。她去世於1340年10月1日之後在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾布臣,第一代特威茲穆爾男爵。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Latimer于大约1260年出生在苏格兰艾爾金爾时，她的父亲William le Latimer 1st Baron Latimer of Corby20岁，母亲Alice Ledet13岁。她于大约1277年与Sir Alexander Comyn结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。她去世于1340年10月1日之后在英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾布臣,第一代特威茲穆爾男爵。

nameMeanings.name: Latimer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a Latinist, a clerk who wrote documents in Latin, from Anglo-Norman French latinier, latim(m)ier. Latin was more or less the universal language of official documents in the Middle Ages, displaced only gradually by the vernacular – in England, by Anglo-Norman French at first, and eventually by English.

variants.name: Latner
meanings: English: occupational name for a worker in or maker of latten or brass, from Middle English latoun ‘brass’ (Old French laton). This name may sometimes have been confused with Latimer .
Altered form of German   Lattner   or   Lettner  .

variants.name: Lattner
meanings: German: occupational name for a carpenter who prepared or used laths or slats, from Middle High German latte ‘slat, lath’ + -n (plural suffix) + the agent suffix -er.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Latimer was born about 1260, in Elginshire, Scotland, her father, William le Latimer 1st Baron Latimer of Corby, was 20 and her mother, Alice Ledet, was 13. She married Sir Alexander Comyn about 1277. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. She died after 1 October 1340, in Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Latimer est née environ 1260, à Elginshire, Écosse, son père, William le Latimer 1st Baron Latimer of Corby, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Alice Ledet, avait 13 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Alexander Comyn environ 1277. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Elle est décédée après 1 octobre 1340, à Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Latimer um 1260 in Elginshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William le Latimer 1st Baron Latimer of Corby 20 und ihre Mutter Alice Ledet 13. Sie hat um 1277 Sir Alexander Comyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1. Oktober 1340 in Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Latimer è nata il circa 1260 nel Elginshire, Scotland, sua padre, William le Latimer 1st Baron Latimer of Corby, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Alice Ledet, aveva 13 anni. Lei sposato Sir Alexander Comyn circa 1277. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì dopo il 1 ottobre 1340, nel Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Latimerが約1260年にスコットランドエルジンシュアイアで生まれた時，父William le Latimer 1st Baron Latimer of Corbyは20歳，母Alice Ledetは13歳であった。約1277年にSir Alexander Comynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1340年10月1日以後にイギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアブチャンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Latimer(이)가 대략 1260년 스컷랜드 엘긴실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William le Latimer 1st Baron Latimer of Corby(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Ledet(은)는 13세였다. 그녀는 대략 1277년 Sir Alexander Comyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1340년 10월 1일 이후 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르 버챈에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Latimer nasceu aproximadamente 1260, em Elginshire, Scotland, seu pai, William le Latimer 1st Baron Latimer of Corby, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Alice Ledet, tinha 13 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Alexander Comyn aproximadamente 1277. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1 de outubro de 1340, em Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Latimer родилась около 1260 г. в местности элгиншир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени William le Latimer 1st Baron Latimer of Corby было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Ledet, 13. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Alexander Comyn около 1277 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Она умерла после 1 октябрь 1340 г. в местности бучань, абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания.
